extraction.one_line_summary: SAGAN Peter launched an opportunistic sprint early while lead-out trains imploded inside 1km, holding off EWAN Caleb after Quick Step solo attack failed at 1.6km.
tactical_patterns: Quick Step attacked without sprinter 1.6km out, exploiting Orica lead-out collapse forcing MESICS Lucas to chase alone.
Seven-rider teams caused lead-out disintegration: EWAN abandoned by MESICS with 900m remaining, forced to find alternate wheel.
SAGAN recognized sprint train chaos and launched 300m+ early while rivals still organizing, negating pure speed advantage.

rider_signals.MESICS Lucas: negative: Slovenian champion sacrificed early for EWAN, died with 900m left, couldn't find relief wheel despite looking.
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: neutral: Strong speed but Orica seven-man team structure failed final kilometer organization against opportunistic attack.
rider_signals.Quick Step team: positive: Attacked 1.6km out despite bringing no designated sprinter, revealing aggressive racing philosophy over traditional tactics.
